name: Comtrust
description_short: COMTRUST Federal Credit Union offers comprehensive banking services including checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards with competitive rates and personalized service.
description_long: COMTRUST Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution celebrating over 90 years of service to its community. As a credit union, it operates on a not-for-profit model designed to prioritize member benefits over shareholder profits. The organization positions itself as a trusted financial partner offering personal and business banking solutions. COMTRUST provides a full suite of banking products including checking accounts (Free Checking, eChecking, Gold 50, Teen Checking), savings vehicles (savings accounts, money market, IRAs, CDs), lending products (auto loans, motorcycle/boat/RV loans, personal loans, mortgages, HELOCs), and credit cards. Their VISA Platinum Credit Card features a fixed 9.9% APR with no annual fee and reward points. Digital services include online banking, bill pay, eStatements, mobile banking, and mobile deposit capture. They offer business checking accounts and serve both individual and business members. Key distinguishing factors include their credit union membership model, which typically offers lower fees and more competitive rates than traditional banks. They currently promote a double reward points campaign on credit card spending through June and offer $500 off mortgage origination fees. Their recent relocation of their main office and 90-year institutional history suggest stability and community integration. The organization provides branch locations, comprehensive digital banking infrastructure, and dedicated member services. As a credit union, COMTRUST members must meet eligibility requirements to join, which is a limitation compared to traditional banks. While they offer competitive rates and no-fee checking, specific APRs and terms are not detailed on the website beyond the 9.9% credit card rate. Like most financial institutions, their product competitiveness depends on individual member circumstances and comparison with other credit unions and banks.
services: Free Checking accounts with no hidden fees
eChecking and Gold 50 checking accounts with premium features
Teen Checking for younger account holders
Auto loans for new and used vehicles
Motorcycle, boat, and RV financing
Personal loans for various borrowing needs
VISA Platinum Credit Card with 9.9% fixed APR and rewards
Savings accounts with competitive rates
Money market accounts
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs)
Certificates of Deposit (CDs)
Mortgage loans with fixed and variable rate options
Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) with fixed rate option
Business checking accounts (Free and Gold tiers)
Online banking and bill pay
Mobile banking app with balance checking and fund transfers
Mobile deposit capture
eStatements
CardValet card management service
LoanPay Xpress for fast loan payments from any institution
pros: Credit union membership typically delivers lower fees and more competitive rates than traditional banks
Fixed 9.9% APR credit card with no annual fee and reward points program
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, HELOCs, and business banking
Full-featured digital banking including mobile app, bill pay, mobile deposit capture, and online banking
$500 off mortgage origination fee promotion for home purchases and refinances
Multiple checking account tiers (Free, eChecking, Gold 50, Teen Checking) serving different customer needs
Established 90+ year history suggesting institutional stability and community presence
cons: Credit union membership requires eligibility criteria that may restrict access compared to traditional banks
Website does not display specific APRs for auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, or savings accounts—requires contacting for quotes
Limited branch network compared to large national banks, restricting convenience for non-local members
No mention of overdraft protection, low-balance loans, or emergency cash products on the website
Rewards structure for credit card points not fully detailed on homepage
best_for: Members seeking comprehensive banking services from a community-focused credit union with competitive rates
Borrowers looking for auto, personal, or mortgage financing with favorable credit union terms
Savers wanting multiple account options (savings, money market, CDs, IRAs) with competitive rates
Small business owners needing business checking and lending products from a local financial institution
diagnosis: COMTRUST is best for individuals and small business owners seeking comprehensive banking services from an established credit union with competitive rates and lower fees. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility requirements apply, and specific rates are not displayed online—prospective members must contact the institution or visit a branch for detailed product information and rate quotes.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: COMTRUST Federal Credit Union offers comprehensive banking services including checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards.
